_notes: Canonical network allowlist for agent-index org setup and ongoing operations.
Read at org-setup time (create-org Step 3b) and on demand (@ai:verify-network-allowlist).
- Wildcard hosts (e.g., '*.googleapis.com') not supported in v1; tests specific subhosts only. Add wildcard schema in a future version bump if needed.
- Periodic auto-verification not implemented. Admin invocation only - no background network calls.
- Backend-tier hosts for non-gdrive adapters are populated dynamically from filesystem-adapter-{id}/adapter.json required_domains field; only the gdrive section is enumerated here.
Adding a new infrastructure host: add to the infrastructure[] array; the create-org Step 3b loop and @ai:verify-network-allowlist task automatically test it on next invocation.

infrastructure.purpose: Adapter bundle download; marketplace directory fetches; canonical-listing reads (infrastructure-directory.json, marketplace-directory.json, etc.)
Adapter repository access (clone path); collection-zip 302-redirect origin
Collection directory lookup via GitHub API
Collection zip archive downloads (github.com redirects archive URLs here). Added in core 3.7.3 to close bug 20260515-8d20ea22.

telemetry.purpose: Install diagnostics and log upload (optional). Derive hostname from agent-index.json log_collector_url; if empty, this entry is skipped.

backend._populated_by: filesystem-adapter-{backend_id}/adapter.json required_domains field for adapters not enumerated below. The enumeration here is the documented set; the dynamic read is the source of truth for non-enumerated backends.
